feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Loading End and Departure message identifier
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

This has reference to our production environment (PEW) where incoming Loading End and Departure messages for FO is coming almost at the same time from EWM-->TM.

Loading End was reported at 10:12:39 and Departure was reported at 10:12:50.

Can you please help us to know if there exists an identifier using which we would be able to differentiate a Loading End message with Departure message.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Stock Room Management and SAP TM in S/4HANA
entry.content: Dear all, an Integration between SAP LE-TRA and Stock Room Management is possible in my eyes at the moment in S/4HANA. But after 2030 when SAP stop the support of LE-TRA, then there is not integration anymore with Stock Room Managment. What should the client do? Is an integration between SAP TM and Stock Room Management in S/4HANA possible? If yes, how is this possible between both Systems?

entry.title: Auto warehouse task creation not working for return purchase order
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a return purchase order with batch updated in the purchase order. I created a delivery and ODO created in the S4 HANA embedded 2023 system.

Auto picking warehouse task is not creating, but when I try manually system is picking stock automatically.

I have maintained the condition records with action definition "/SCWM/PDO_01_WT_CREATE".

normally sales order its picking fine.

Please let me know if I am missing any configuration or it is standard behaviour.

entry.title: Scanning transactions for the warehouse in SAP Fiori / S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear all,

Which scanner transactions offers SAP Fiori for the Warehouse Management?

Which possibilties or Apps are there in SAP EWM? 

In SAP ECC we used the LM-Transactions for the Warehouse, and it was systemguided / driven or user driven.

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: Define Storage Bin Structure
entry.content: I would like Define Storage Bin Structure like on screen but still I have error message. Please for advice how I should resolve the problem.

entry.title: Create JOB /SCWM/CHM_LOG
entry.content: Hello everyone. I want create a job CHM_LOG. But when I run the LOG_ACT I see this error message. Can anyone help me to solve the problem?

entry.title: zodstm difference
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some difference stock in T-CODE ZODSTM PE1 bettwen SAP and LSP partner system.Is there any way we can clear this difference ?

Thanks

entry.title: Missing option how to reverse delivery distribution from EWM
entry.content:
We are missing an option on how to reverse the distribution of delivery from EWM. Problems occur when we want to change the amount on inbound delivery or batch on outbound delivery.

 

is there any option how to reverse delivery so we will be able to edit delivery in ERP (VL02/VL32)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Partial goods issue for the work order through Basic EWM functionality
entry.content:
Partial goods issue for the work order through Basic EWM functionality

We are having the Delivery based production integration in my current project. The client is having the basic EWM functionality. When the process order is requesting the raw materials for the staging area, in EWM we will get the Outbound Delivery. 

As off now, I can be able to issue full OBD quantities to the staging area. But the client ask is to issue the partial quantities with one OBD.

How we can be able to achieve this?

 

Regards

entry.title: Problem with One SU created from multiple at Goods Receipt
entry.content: Hi, I have received one material which consisted of a number of SUs. The batch is the same for all  the material, and it is being stored in a bulk storage area which is a push back bin. The problem is that the new SU numbers  are not being created. One SU keeps getting bigger. For example 1 SU should be 1000 ea only but  now one SU is increasing quantity each time I receive another  and now has 4000 ea. No new SUs number are being generated. Anyone have any idea why this could be?  How can i stop this happening?

entry.title: EWM HU number range unique at mandant level
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing EWM in two factories (before more). Those factories will transfer produced goods in HU to a DC center (wich aims to be on EWM) & between themselves (for semi-finish goods).

Goods will be packed within same packaging material and can be transferred within all EWM warehouses. Based on this, we need to use the same HU numbering for those HU in all factories.

Problem is, standard EWM HU numbering (number range /SCWM/HUID) is based on warehouse number :

 

Thus, if we have same Packaging material in all warehouses, we cannot use same number range such as HU_VEKP.

The only solution we have found is the use of BADI / SCWM/EX_CORE_HU_EXT_HUID where we can manipulate HU number at it’s creation to use number range HU_VEKP to have a unique HU number at mandant level. Prerequisite is external HU number range is the same as HU_VEKP.

However, we would like to avoir making a specific for this. Consequently, we are wondering if a standard solution exist to ensure a unique HU number at mandant level for an EWM HU creation.

We are looking forward to your answers.

Best Regards.

entry.title: EWM Exception Codes
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

We have sensitive material that must not be touched by hand. That's why we often want to pick the whole box (24 pcs) instead of the requested quantity (1 pc). There is one HU in a storage bin.

Current situation:
Request quantity of a warehouse task with 1 pc.
The stock is increased in the RF with an exception code (with process code DIFF in the background).

The requirement is that a complete box with 24 pc is picked instead of just the request quantity of 1 pc.

This works so far, except for the following case, which also seems logical:

A warehouse task is created in storage bin 1 with a request for 1 pc.
A short time later, a warehouse task 2 is created in storage bin 1 with a request for 1 pc.

Problem:
The exception code can no longer be used within the first warehouse tasks, as a second warehouse tasks has been created in the storage bin/HU. So we can not increase the request amoung. 

How can we ensure that the exception code can always be used?
The reason for the problem is that a second warehouse tasks exists on this storage bin/HU.

It makes no sense to block the storage bin that no other warehouse task will be created, as it will then no longer be possible to pick goods from this storage bin (for our first warehouse task). Rounding options? Standard options? Do you know a BadI for example to pick from a storage bin that is blocked? 

Any creative ideas?
Thank you! 🙂

entry.title: Enhancement our user exsit in outbound delivery save
entry.content: Enhancement our user exist to  in outbound delivery save for integration with CRM

entry.title: Staging to production with intermediate storage bins
entry.content:
Hi,

we use advanced production integration based on PMRs in EWM 9.40.

In one of our warehouses a third party system is installed on a production line. Here we would like to implement the following process.

1) A production order will be released and a PMR will be created in EWM. 

2) E.g. 1 or 2 hours before the planned production start, warehouse tasks for staging are created (e.g. by /SCWM/STAGE) to transfer all required components to an intermediate bin in a pallet storage that is inside the production supply area. The destination bin should be proposed by EWM (= empty bin) or it will be confirmed manually by the forklift driver. 

3)  Some time later the production line will be set up for the production order. This is the trigger for the third party system on the production line to send a first warehouse request to EWM to transfer specified components from the intermediate pallet storage to specified storage bins on the production line. 
In the running production the third party system has to create further warehouse requests if e.g. the available quantity of a component falls below a defined value.  

4) The consumption for the components is posted by the third party system during production with function module /SCWM/MFG_CONSUME_ITEMS_EXT. The storage bin on the production line (see step 3) is specified as the goods movement bin for the consumption postings.

 

The steps 1 and 4 are no problem. But I don´t know how to set up the steps 2 and 3.

Is this process possible in EWM 9.40 in standard?  

Thank you for any advice.

Best regards, Julian

entry.title: Function Module for Changing the Value of a Count Result (Physical Inventory)
entry.content:
Hello, i have the requirement to change the counted Result of a Physical Inventory, like you do in the Transaction LI12N.

I have already found a function module to enter count results -> L_INV_COUNT_EXT
But if i try to overwrite the Position i get the exception NO_COUNT_ALLOWED.
Has anyone a idea how to do this?

Kind Regards Niklas

entry.title: Outbound POSC: Final loading WT not getting generated automatically
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have configured POSC for outbound but WT for final step is not getting generated. Attached are my config steps. I completed picking, packing at WC and movement to staging.

(I read one blog for expert where it is not recommended to have load task automatic but this is technically possible). Please advise.

Regards

entry.title: Not able to maintain condition record for custom physical inventory form in EWM
entry.content:
Hi All,

We developed one custom form for Physical Inventory in EWM. For that we created one custom action definition and one Badi filter (method call) for PPF. But getting an error while maintaining condition record in SCWM/PRHU6. Please suggest if I missed any step. 

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Sachin.

entry.title: Spool request not generated for custom form in EWM
entry.content:
Developed the custom form for Physical Inventory in EWM but spool is not generated. maintained the condition records (SCWM/PRHU6) and spool parameters (SCWM/60000431).

Please suggest. 

Regards,

Sachin.

entry.title: How to display landed cost of multiped PO
entry.content: How I can get the landed cost list against PO list. If I am not authorized for the SAP Tables. I want to know the standard T. Code for that if SAP provided.

entry.title: New Handling Unit Transactions in S/4HANA - COWBPACK, HUWE and HU_CREATE will disappear
entry.content:
Dear all,

in the ECC world we speak about different Handling Unit Transactions like COWBPACK, HUWE and HU_CREATE.

But if we implement now the S/4HANA System, then these transactions COWBPACK, HUWE and HU_CREATE will disappear.

Which new replacement transactions will be for them in S/4HANA world? 

 

Thanks a lot.

BR,

Chris
